---
title: Invoice History
description: A compact invoice and receipt table for customer billing surfaces.
---

import { InvoiceHistoryDemo } from '@/components/lomi-ui/demo';

# Invoice History

Use this in customer portals or merchant billing views.

## Preview

<InvoiceHistoryDemo />

## Installation

<Installation name="invoice-history" />

## Usage

```tsx
import { InvoiceHistory } from '@/components/lomi-ui/invoice-history';

<InvoiceHistory
  invoices={[
    {
      id: 'inv_001',
      date: 'May 28, 2026',
      description: 'Growth plan',
      amount: 25000,
      currency: 'XOF',
      status: 'paid',
    },
  ]}
/>;
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Description |
| ---- | ---- | ----------- |
| `invoices` | `InvoiceHistoryItem[]` | Invoice rows. |
| `title` | `string` | Optional heading. |
| `description` | `string` | Optional supporting text. |
| `onDownload` | `(invoiceId: string) => void` | Fallback download handler. |
